header.search: Search for jobs, skills, or people

menu.profileDesc: Open your public and personal profile data
menu.settingsDesc: Settings screen will be added next

landing.chip: Professional networking, redesigned for clarity and momentum
landing.heading: Grow your career with a network that feels premium, smart, and focused.
landing.subheading: Discover better roles, stronger connections, and real market insight through a cleaner professional experience built for modern talent.
landing.momentum2: 2 recruiters viewed your profile this week
landing.featureHeading: Premium tools that keep your next move in focus
landing.featureSub: Every section is structured to help users understand value faster, trust the product sooner, and take action with confidence.
landing.feature1Desc: Connect based on actual skills and project history, not just job titles. Enter a lounge of curated experts.
landing.feature2Desc: Know your exact worth with real-time salary insights, trend analysis, and positioning signals.
landing.feature3Desc: Say goodbye to generic job boards. Get matched with high-signal roles that fit your exact professional DNA.
landing.stepsHeading: A simple path from profile clarity to real opportunity
landing.stepsSub: Every step is designed to reduce noise, sharpen your signal, and move you faster toward the right connections and roles.
landing.step1Desc: Shape a profile around expertise, proof, and positioning so the right people understand your value in seconds.
landing.step2Desc: Follow the industries, operators, and conversations that matter instead of scrolling through generic noise.
landing.step3Desc: Apply, connect, and negotiate using stronger visibility and clearer market signals.
landing.trustHeading: A more modern interface increases trust before users even click.
landing.trustSub: The updated visual system combines premium gradients, softer glass surfaces, stronger layout rhythm, and clearer calls to action across the journey.
landing.trust1Desc: Turn salary data and role insights into better career decisions without the guesswork.
landing.trust2Desc: Present your profile with a polished structure that feels credible to recruiters and peers.
landing.trust3Desc: Guide users from discovery to connection with less friction and more confidence.

post.whatToTalk: What do you want to talk about?
